front.title: Signalling DHCPv6 Prefix per Client Availability to Hosts

abstract.t: This document defines a "P" flag in the Prefix Information Option (PIO) of IPv6 Router Advertisements (RAs). The flag is used to indicate that the network prefers that clients do not use the prefix provided in the PIO for SLAAC but instead request a prefix via DHCPv6 PD, and use that delegated prefix to form addresses.
